security.csp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost data:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost

bundle.shortDescription: Understand, organize, and reclaim your Downloads folder.
bundle.longDescription: File Lens scans your Downloads folder and provides transparent cleanup and organization recommendations. Every change is previewed and requires confirmation; nothing is modified silently.
